tagline: Independent building inspections for buyers, sellers, and developers across Newcastle and Sydney.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get an inspection?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule inspections within 48–72 hours of booking. For urgent requests, same-day or next-day appointments may be available.

faqs.question: What areas do you service?
faqs.answer: We service Newcastle, the Hunter Valley, and Sydney CBD and surrounds. Contact us if you're unsure whether your property falls within our range.

faqs.question: How long does a report take?
faqs.answer: You'll receive your written report within 24 hours of the inspection, usually on the same day.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our inspectors are fully licensed building practitioners and carry professional indemnity and public liability insurance.

team.name: Principal Inspector
team.title: Licensed Building Inspector
team.bio: Over 15 years of experience in residential and commercial construction.
